title: Word Search
description:
Given an `m x n` grid of characters `board` and a string `word`, return `true`
if `word` exists in the grid. The word is built from sequentially adjacent
cells (horizontal/vertical neighbors); the same cell may not be used twice.
constraints: board and word consist of lowercase/uppercase letters.

solutions.summary: From each cell, walk matching neighbors, marking visited and undoing on backtrack.

steps.title: Search each start cell with backtracking
steps.explanation: At each step, match `word[i]`, temporarily blank the cell, recurse into the four neighbors, then restore the cell.
